chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2632 - وَ رَوَى اَلْكَاهِلِيُّ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : «تَلْبَسُ اَلْمَرْأَةُ اَلْمُحْرِمَةُ اَلْحُلِيَّ كُلَّهُ إِلاَّ اَلْقُرْطَ اَلْمَشْهُورَ وَ اَلْقِلاَدَةَ اَلْمَشْهُورَةَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2632 - Al-Kahili narrated from Imam (as) that he said:
"A woman in Ihram may wear all types of jewelry except conspicuous earrings (al-qurt al-mashhoor) and a conspicuous necklace (al-qiladah al-mashhoorah)."
